description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push with any tag, on pull requests to devel and master branches, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have two ubuntu-latest jobs: build-sdist to checkout, install Python 3.7, setup apt and dependencies, then build source distribution and wheel artifacts; and upload_pypi that depends on build-sdist, downloads the artifacts, and uploads them to PyPI using a token from secrets.
